competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Cursor AI Editor 2026 Major Updates:

Composer 2.5 (May 18, 2026): Substantial improvement in intelligence, better at sustained work on long-running tasks, follows complex instructions more reliably.

Jira Integration (May 19, 2026): Cursor available in Jira, assign work items to Cursor, mention @Cursor to kick off a cloud agent.

Cursor Automations in Agents Window: Configure automations with multiple attached repos or no repos, agents reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks.

Interactive Canvases (April 15, 2026): Cursor can now respond by creating interactive canvases with visualizations including dashboards and custom interfaces built using first-party components like tables, boxes, diagrams, and charts.

Cursor 3 (April 2, 2026): Unified workspace for building software with agents. Agents Window for parallel local/cloud agent execution. Move agent session from local to cloud to keep running while offline. /best-of-n runs the same task in parallel across multiple models. Multi-repo Agents Window lets you work across different repos from one place. Enterprise self-hosted cloud agents keep code inside own infrastructure.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Cursor AI Editor 2026 Major Updates:

Composer 2.5 (May 18, 2026): Substantial improvement in intelligence, better at

changes.description: Cursor 3 Agents Window：支持并行本地/云端 agent session，session 可从本地迁移到云端持续运行
changes.evidence: 「move an agent session from local to cloud to keep it running while you're offline, or so that you can move on to the next task」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：session 本地→云端无缝迁移，实现 AI session 的跨环境持久化，与 meee2 的 session 可移植性概念高度重叠

changes.description: Interactive Canvases：AI 可生成包含 dashboard、自定义界面、图表的可交互 canvas
changes.evidence: 「Cursor can now respond by creating interactive canvases with visualizations that can include dashboards and custom interfaces built using first-party components like tables, boxes, diagrams, and charts」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：descriptive-first canvas——AI 生成可交互界面，接近「flow 从行为 emerge」的 canvas 概念

changes.description: Cursor Automations 支持多 repo 配置，agent 跨 repo 推理、交付、验证任务
changes.evidence: 「introduces the ability to configure automations with multiple attached repos or no repos at all, so agents reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 repo 的 artifact pull 和 agent 推理，向跨工具 context 整合方向延伸

changes.description: Cursor 定位从 AI 代码编辑器演进为「unified workspace for building software with agents」
changes.evidence: 「Cursor 3 is a unified workspace for building software with agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 整体定位向 workspace + agents 靠拢，与 meee2 的 AI-human session workspace 框架产生方向性重叠

key_findings: Cursor 3 Agents Window：并行 agent sessions + 本地/云端 session 迁移，session 持久化跨环境运行
Interactive Canvases (April 2026)：AI 可生成可交互 dashboard 和自定义界面，直接触碰 descriptive canvas 概念

competitors.name: Claude.ai
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Claude.ai 2026 Major Updates:

Live Artifacts (April 2026): Dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time reopened. Stay connected to data sources, useful for KPI monitoring, pipeline tracking without manual updates.

Artifacts + MCP (recent): MCP servers enable direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more from within artifacts.

Artifacts can call Claude API: Build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself.

Claude Managed Agents in sandbox (recent): Agents operate in a sandbox you control, connect to private MCP servers. Both environment and services run within enterprise boundaries.

Skills 2.0 (Q1 2026): Pre-built Skills for Excel, PowerPoint, Word, PDF. Full workflow packages with executable scripts.

MCP integrations (March 2026): Connects to 6,000+ apps including Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Stripe, Figma, Zapier.

Claude Code (GA since 2025-05-22): Terminal-first agentic coding tool, runs autonomously, picks up where it left off across sessions.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Claude.ai 2026 Major Updates:

Live Artifacts (April 2026): Dashboards and trackers that refresh with current da

changes.description: Live Artifacts：artifact 与数据源保持 live 连接，每次重新打开自动刷新为最新数据
changes.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：这是对「跨工具 artifact live link（不是 snapshot）」概念的直接实现，与 meee2 核心差异化锚点高度重叠

changes.description: Artifacts + MCP：artifact 可直接连接 Google Calendar、Gmail、Slack 等外部服务，实现跨工具数据拉取
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts now support Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull（F9）——artifact 可主动从多工具拉取数据，不再是孤立内容

changes.description: Claude Managed Agents：可在用户控制的 sandbox 中运行并连接私有 MCP 服务器，企业级 agent 环境隔离
changes.evidence: 「Claude Managed Agents can now operate in a sandbox you control and connect to your private Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers」

changes.description: Artifacts 可嵌入 Claude API 调用：artifact 内部可运行 AI，构建 micro-application
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, which means you can build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：artifact 内部嵌入 AI 推理，模糊 artifact 与 session 的边界

key_findings: Live Artifacts 上线（April 2026）：artifact 持续连接数据源，不再是静态 snapshot，直接实现 meee2 锚点 #2
Artifacts + MCP：artifact 可直接连接外部服务，实现跨工具数据拉取，触碰 meee2 锚点 #4

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
GitHub Copilot Product Overview (fetched from github.com/features/copilot)

Core: AI-powered developer tool providing 'contextualized assistance throughout the software development lifecycle'. Operates across IDEs, GitHub.com, terminals, and chat apps.

Code Generation & Assistance: Inline completions, chat-based coding assistance, documentation support, 50 agent mode or chat requests per month (Free tier).

Agent Capabilities: Autonomous task execution in background workflows. Integration with third-party agents (Claude by Anthropic, OpenAI Codex). Enterprise-grade agent management with audit logs.

Workspace & Customization: Copilot Spaces for shared knowledge management. Custom MCP server integrations. Organization-specific context from docs and repositories.

Code Review & Security: Copilot code review, vulnerability detection, Secure MCP integration controls.

Pricing: Free ($0, limited), Pro ($10/user/month), Pro+ ($39/user/month, advanced models), Business/Enterprise (org-focused).

Positioning: 'a copilot, not autopilot' — designed to enhance developer productivity rather than fully automate code creation.
competitors.content_hash:
GitHub Copilot Product Overview (fetched from github.com/features/copilot)

Core: AI-powered developer tool providing 'contextualized assistance throughout the

changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：MCP 在 Copilot Workspace 层的显式集成，向跨工具 artifact pull 方向延伸

changes.evidence: 「Pro+: $39/user/month with advanced models... Free: 50 agent mode or chat requests per month」

changes.evidence: 「a copilot, not autopilot—designed to enhance developer productivity rather than fully automate code creation」

key_findings: MCP server 集成从隐式变为 Workspace 功能的显式组成部分，并新增 Secure MCP controls
新增 Pro+ 档位（$39/month）和 Free 档 agent mode 访问，扩大 agent 功能覆盖面

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Linear 2026 Major Updates:

Linear Agent (March 24, 2026) - public beta for all teams:
- Skills: Save reusable workflows as skills (e.g., catching up on projects, drafting issues from meeting notes). Can run from skills menu or slash command. Linear auto-applies skills when applicable.
- Automations: Trigger agent workflows when issues enter triage. Intelligently refine, synthesize, act on issues. Available on Business and Enterprise plans.
- Code Intelligence: Extends Linear Agent understanding to codebase. Supports code-aware tasks: diagnosing app functionality, designing technical specifications. Ask how a feature is implemented, why something behaves a certain way, what a change might affect, which technical constraints should shape a plan.

Linear Diffs (May 27, 2026):
- Native code review experience within Linear
- Guided reviews: Shows core of change first, explains consequences, separates glue code from primary changes
- Agent Iteration: When review calls for changes, iterate from diff surface with a background coding agent. Agent changes update the diff in real-time.
- All reviews sync back to GitHub
- Available on all plans; guided reviews free in beta (Business/Enterprise)

Linear CEO declared: 'issue tracking is dead' — pivoting to agents as the primary product paradigm.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Linear 2026 Major Updates:

Linear Agent (March 24, 2026) - public beta for all teams:
- Skills: Save reusable workflows

changes.description: Linear Agent + Code Intelligence：agent 可推理代码库实际行为，回答「为何如此运作」「变更影响什么」等工程问题
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase and supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI agent 深入嵌入产品工作流，能在 PM-engineering 边界内推理，向人+AI 同协议工作方向延伸

changes.description: Linear Diffs：在 diff 界面直接启动 background coding agent 迭代，agent 变更实时更新 diff 视图
changes.evidence: 「When a review calls for changes, keep iterating from the diff surface with a background coding agent, and agent changes update the diff in real-time」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1/#2：background agent 在工作流内实时操作并 live 反映结果，是 human-AI 同流协作的直接实现

changes.description: Linear Agent Skills：可将对话结果保存为可复用 skill，支持 slash command 调用或自动触发
changes.evidence: 「when a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill, which is especially useful for recurring workflows」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：从实际行为 emerge workflow（skill 从对话结果保存），非预先声明

changes.description: Linear CEO 宣告「issue tracking is dead」，Linear 定位从项目管理工具转向 AI agent 驱动的产品开发系统
changes.evidence: 「Linear adopts agentic AI as CEO declares issue tracking dead」（The Register, 2026-03-26）
changes.meee2_relevance: 整体定位转向 agent-first 工作流，向 meee2 的「AI 作为协作参与者」定位靠近

key_findings: Linear Diffs（May 27, 2026）：background agent 在 diff 界面实时迭代，agent 变更 live 更新——human-AI 同流协作的具体实现
Linear Agent + Code Intelligence：agent 具备工程级代码推理能力，Linear 正成为 PM-engineering bridge 的 AI 协作平台
Linear CEO 宣告 issue tracking 已死，全面转向 agent-first 产品范式

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Notion AI 2026 Major Updates:

Notion Developer Platform (May 13, 2026 - v3.5):
- Workers: Cloud-based sandbox for custom code. Teams can write logic, deploy to isolated environment, sync data, build custom tools, trigger work with webhooks.
- External Agents API: Bring external agents into Notion (Claude, Codex, Decagon, custom). Agents work out of the box.
- Notion MCP: Connect to external apps via MCP. Pre-configured partner integrations: Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry.

Custom Agents (February 2026):
- AI teammates for repetitive tasks: answering FAQs, compiling status updates, automating workflows
- 1M+ agents built by customers
- Can now read and reply in private Slack channels
- Automations: Multi-step automated workflows that pull data from any database

Custom Agents can read/reply in private Slack channels (recent): Agents see only invited private channels.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Notion AI 2026 Major Updates:

Notion Developer Platform (May 13, 2026 - v3.5):
- Workers: Cloud-based sandbox

changes.description: Notion Developer Platform 上线：Workers 运行时（sandbox 代码执行）+ External Agents API（接入 Claude/Codex/Decagon）
changes.evidence: 「Notion introduced a new developer platform that extends the capabilities of its custom AI agents, connects with external agents, and allows teams to build automated multistep workflows that can pull in data from any database」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 agent/工具数据拉取与 multistep workflow，但仍以 Notion 为中心，而非对等的 artifact pull

changes.description: Notion MCP：接入 Linear、Figma、GitHub、Stripe 等 12+ 工具，形成以 Notion 为 hub 的跨工具数据网络
changes.evidence: 「Notion MCP: Connect to external apps via the Model Context Protocol. Use pre-configured partner integrations, including Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：以 Notion 为中心的跨工具数据拉取网络，方向是 inward-pull 而非 meee2 的 outward-link

changes.description: Custom Agents 进入私有 Slack 频道：AI agents 可在私有频道中读取/回复
changes.evidence: 「Custom Agents can now read and reply in private Slack channels」

key_findings: Notion Developer Platform（May 2026）：Workers sandbox + External Agents API，Notion 从工具升级为 AI agent hub
Notion MCP 接入 12+ 主流工具，构建以 Notion 为中心的跨工具数据网络

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Slack AI 2026 Major Updates:

Generate AI Response step in Workflow Builder (rolling out April 21-30): Write a prompt, point at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), let LLM do the work. Tasks: summarizing threads, translating messages, drafting replies. Available on Business+ v2 and Enterprise+ plans.

New Slackbot (generally available): Rebuilt as full AI agent for Business+ and Enterprise+ customers. Can search enterprise data, draft documents, take actions on behalf of employees.

Desktop split view: Pin channels, threads, apps, canvases, or agents side by side. Reference information while interacting with AI tools without breaking flow.

Agent development tools: Single 'slack create agent' command, enhanced Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM. Support for Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Slack AI 2026 Major Updates:

Generate AI Response step in Workflow Builder (rolling out April 21-30): Write a prompt

changes.description: Slackbot 全面重建为企业级 AI agent：可搜索企业数据、起草文档、代表员工执行操作
changes.evidence: 「Salesforce launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot, transforming it from a simple notification tool into a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, and taking action on behalf of employees」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI agent 作为工作流参与者（代员工行动），但仍是 chat 范式而非 session 范式

changes.description: Desktop split view 支持 agent 并排固定：在不中断当前工作流的情况下与 AI agent 交互
changes.evidence: 「A desktop split view lets users pin channels, threads, apps, canvases, or agents side by side, making it easy to reference information while interacting with AI tools without breaking flow」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：peripheral 层概念——不打断焦点与 AI 交互，与 meee2 菜单栏「不切焦点」定位有结构相似

changes.description: Workflow Builder 新增 Generate AI Response 步骤：LLM 可在自动化流程中处理知识源数据
changes.evidence: 「Slack has added a new Generate AI Response step to automations, where users can write a prompt, point it at knowledge sources — channels, canvases, lists — and let an LLM do the work」

key_findings: Slackbot 重建为全功能 AI agent（GA），可代员工搜索、起草、执行操作
Desktop split view 支持 agent 并排工作，不中断流程——peripheral 层新竞争信号

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Reflect Notes 2026 Updates:

AI Model Options: Now supports both GPT-4o (OpenAI) and Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic). AI voice transcriber, assistant, and chat-with-notes features.

Link Saving: When saving a link, Reflect automatically generates a short AI summary of the page.

Offline Images: Images now available offline, sync when back online.

Mobile: AI palette editor accessible via iPhone app.

iCal Integration: Add events from iCal into Reflect by connecting iCloud account.

Core positioning: Personal networked note-taking with backlinks and AI. Real-time cross-device sync. End-to-end encryption.

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Raycast 2.0 Major Updates (2026):

Agents (renamed from Presets): Reused across chats. Updating an agent's config applies to every chat using it.

Memory: Chats remember context about you. Feel more personal over time.

Skills: Custom instructions and knowledge for recurring tasks. Skills and AI Extensions loaded dynamically when relevant — no manual mention needed.

Branch Messages: Branch off any message to explore different directions without losing original thread.

Auto-archive: Chats auto-archived after set period.

MCP HTTP Servers: SSE and Streamable protocols (experimental). OpenRouter access to wide range of public models.

New Public Beta: New UI, files & folders in root search, AI dictation (system-wide dictation, single-tap modifier hotkeys, international keyboard support).

GitHub Integration: Monitor Copilot coding agent logs live in Raycast. Assign issues to Copilot agent from Raycast.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Raycast 2.0 Major Updates (2026):

Agents (renamed from Presets): Reused across chats. Updating an agent's config applies to eve

changes.description: Presets 改名为 Agents，配置变更跨全部关联 chat 同步；新增 Memory（跨 chat 记忆上下文）
changes.evidence: 「Raycast has renamed Presets to Agents, which are now reused across chats. When you update an agent's configuration, the change applies to every chat that uses it. Raycast added Memory so chats remember context about you」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1/#5：菜单栏 peripheral 中的 agent + 跨 chat 记忆，向「不切焦点持久 session」方向延伸

changes.description: Skills 功能：为高频任务定制 AI 指令和知识库，动态加载到 chat（无需手动召唤）
changes.evidence: 「Skills allow you to give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for tasks you do often. Skills and AI Extensions are now loaded into the chat dynamically when they're relevant, so you don't need to mention them manually」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：peripheral 层的 skills 自动触发，与 meee2「5字戳任何 session」的低摩擦接入理念相似

changes.description: MCP HTTP Servers（实验性）+ OpenRouter + GitHub Copilot agent 日志实时监控
changes.evidence: 「Available experiments include MCP HTTP Servers for SSE and Streamable protocols」

key_findings: Raycast 2.0：Presets→Agents + Memory（跨 chat 记忆）+ Skills 动态加载，peripheral 层 AI 能力大幅增强
MCP HTTP Servers（实验性）+ GitHub Copilot agent 日志监控，向跨工具 agent 管控层延伸

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Replit Agent 4 (March 2026):

Parallel Agents: Multiple agents tackle different parts of project simultaneously (auth, database logic, backend, frontend). For large tasks, auto-forks into sub-agents that run concurrently and merge results.

Design Canvas: Infinite board supporting all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools. Replaces Design Mode.

Shared Session Collaboration: Old fork-and-merge model gone. Teammates now work together in a single shared project with agent-assisted merging. Multiple team members can submit requests simultaneously; agent intelligently sequences and executes in optimal order. Each request broken into discrete tasks running in background; track status, review results, approve changes before merging.

Platform Expansion: Replit pivoting to fully integrated productivity suite: canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos, and more. Now targeting knowledge work beyond coding.

Key shift: From code editor → AI software development platform → knowledge work productivity suite.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Replit Agent 4 (March 2026):

Parallel Agents: Multiple agents tackle different parts of project simultaneously (auth, database

changes.description: Replit Agent 4：多 agent 并行执行，大任务自动 fork 为子 agent 并发处理，结果合并
changes.evidence: 「Multiple agents can tackle different parts of the project at once... For large single tasks, Agent 4 automatically breaks them into smaller forks, runs them concurrently using sub-agents, and merges the results」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多 AI agent 并行，每个是独立「快 session」——但仍局限于 coding，非 meee2 的通用 session 范式

changes.description: Design Canvas：无限画布支持全部 artifact 类型、实时预览和直接操作
changes.evidence: 「Design Mode has been replaced by the Design Canvas—an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：canvas 支持全 artifact 类型 + live 预览，接近 meee2 的 descriptive canvas 概念，但以 canvas 为起点而非以行为为起点

changes.description: Shared session 协作：团队成员在同一 shared project 中与 agent 协作，请求并发提交，agent 智能排序执行
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：human + agent 在 shared session 内协同，类似 meee2「人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议」概念

changes.description: Replit 定位从代码编辑器扩展到「fully integrated productivity suite」，覆盖 canvas、apps、sites、slides、videos
changes.evidence: 「Replit is pivoting to be a fully integrated productivity suite, with a canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos, and others」

key_findings: Replit Agent 4（March 2026）：parallel sub-agents + Design Canvas（全 artifact 类型 + live 预览）+ shared session 协作，orchestrator 类最完整的 human-AI 协同实现
定位从 coding 工具向通用 productivity suite 扩展，威胁范围扩大

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Superwhisper 2026 Updates:

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. Use Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any other agentic coding app to drive fleet of agents faster than typing. New design for Modes with dedicated settings view and improved activation flow.

Redesigned UI: New history, full text search, segmented playback, fast load, multi-select delete, upgraded model library.

Cloud AI Models: Remote cloud AI models including Gemini and Grok. Enhanced Gemini language support.

Realtime streaming UI: Live transcription.

ElevenLabs Scribe: New cloud transcription provider.

Core positioning: Voice-to-text for macOS, Windows, iOS. Offline AI transcription + cloud model options.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch结果，非官方原文

Superwhisper 2026 Updates:

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. Use Superwhisper

changes.description: v2.13.0：集成 Claude Code 和 Open Code agent，可通过语音驱动多个 coding agent
changes.evidence: 「you can use Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any other agentic coding app, and it integrates seamlessly so you can drive an entire fleet of agents faster than you can type」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：peripheral 语音层与 agent fleet 的结合，但局限于 coding agents，与 meee2 的通用 session peripheral 无结构重叠

changes.description: Realtime streaming UI + ElevenLabs Scribe + Gemini/Grok 云模型支持
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper unveiled realtime streaming UI with live transcription and added ElevenLabs Scribe as a new cloud transcription provider」

key_findings: v2.13.0 集成 coding agent 驱动（Claude Code、Cursor、Codex），语音→agent fleet 路径成型
核心定位未变，无 session/workspace 类功能，与 meee2 锚点基本无结构重叠

alerts.headline: Cursor 3 Agents Window：agent session 本地→云端无缝迁移，直接触碰 meee2 session 可移植性核心
alerts.evidence: 「move an agent session from local to cloud to keep it running while you're offline, or so that you can move on to the next task」
alerts.action_suggestion: 深度跟踪 Cursor Agents Window 的 session 状态协议。若 session 状态可跨本地/云端/SSH 环境转移并持久化，这与 meee2 的 session 同构性概念产生直接竞争。建议优先研究 Cursor 如何定义和序列化 session 状态，以确认是否形成完整的 session 协议层。

alerts.headline: Cursor Interactive Canvases：AI 生成可交互 dashboard 和自定义界面，触碰 meee2 descriptive canvas 概念
alerts.evidence: 「Cursor can now respond by creating interactive canvases with visualizations that can include dashboards and custom interfaces built using first-party components like tables, boxes, diagrams, and charts」
alerts.action_suggestion: Cursor Canvas 当前聚焦编程可视化场景。meee2 的差异化在于 canvas 由 session 行为 emerge（而非用户或 AI 手动创建）。建议加速阐明 meee2 descriptive canvas 与 Cursor Canvas 的本质区别——前者是 behavior-first，后者是 response-first。

alerts.headline: Claude.ai Live Artifacts：artifact 持续连接数据源（live link，非 snapshot），直接实现 meee2 锚点 #2
alerts.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
alerts.action_suggestion: 这是 meee2 live link 概念的最直接竞品实现。关键差异化：(1) Live Artifacts 是单向 pull（数据源→artifact），meee2 的 live link 是双向的；(2) Live Artifacts 由用户/AI 主动创建，meee2 的 artifact 由 session 行为 emerge。建议在产品 messaging 中强化这两点本质差异。

alerts.headline: Linear Diffs：在 code review 界面直接启动 background agent，agent 变更实时反映——human-AI 同流协作首次落地
alerts.evidence: 「When a review calls for changes, keep iterating from the diff surface with a background coding agent, and agent changes update the diff in real-time」
alerts.action_suggestion: Linear 正在将 human-AI 协作从 chat 范式迁移到 artifact-native 范式（在 diff 内直接与 agent 协作）。这触碰锚点 #1 和 #2。关注 Linear 是否会将此模式扩展到 issues、specs 等其他 artifact 类型，以及 agent 的状态是否作为独立实体（session）暴露。

alerts.headline: Linear Code Intelligence：agent 具备工程级代码推理能力，Linear 成为 PM-engineering bridge 的 AI 协作平台
alerts.evidence: 「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase and supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」
alerts.action_suggestion: Linear 通过 Code Intelligence 将 PM 工作流与 engineering context 深度融合。观察 Linear 是否将 agent 的 context（codebase + issue history）暴露为可外链的 artifact，若是则直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #2/#4。
